hero.tagline: The Launchpad for Africa's Next Generation of Doers.
hero.subhead: A children's professional development platform where young people gain real-world experience in agriculture, AI, entrepreneurship, and life skills to build confidence, purpose, and future readiness.

mission.title: Who We Are
mission.missionText: Empowering children and youth through experiential learning, entrepreneurship, agriculture, technology, and career exploration to become confident problem-solvers and future leaders.
mission.visionText: A generation of African young people equipped with the skills, mindset, and opportunities to create thriving communities and sustainable futures.

programs.title: Our Programs
programs.subtitle: Hands-on learning pathways designed for every stage of childhood and youth development.

items.quote: DreamDo transformed my daughter's confidence. She now talks about starting her own business someday!
items.name: Amina K.

items.quote: The AI Explorers program gave our students a head start in digital skills that we simply couldn't provide in the classroom.
items.name: Mr. Osei

items.quote: As an employer, I've seen firsthand how DreamDo graduates arrive workplace-ready with real problem-solving skills.
items.name: Grace M.

finalCta.title: Ready to help your child dream and do?
finalCta.subtitle: Join hundreds of families already investing in their children's future.
